data.title: Pudgy Penguins NFT brand opens Valentine's Day pop-up shop in NYC with pink-themed decor and attractions.
data.description: The famous non-fungible token collection Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) revealed the launch of a Valentine's Day pop-up shop in New York City. The pop-up shop is located at 55 Delancey Street and features a pink-themed setup. A video shared on Pudgy Penguins' X account showcased the vibrant space with a costumed "Pengu" welcoming visitors. The shop is adorned with heart-shaped displays, soft toys, plush bouquets, couple's photo booths, real-life photo opportunities, and a variety of drinks and treats. The pop-up shop will be open from Thursday to Saturday, operating daily from 12 p.m. to 6 p.m.

data.title: Crypto usage in human trafficking networks increased in 2025. Chainalysis noted a surge despite blockchain's transparency aiding law enforcement.
data.description: According to Chainalysis, the utilization of cryptocurrency in trafficking networks is increasing. Despite this trend, the transparency of blockchain technology could provide insight into these activities, potentially assisting law enforcement agencies.

data.title: Bitcoin's biggest crash since 2021 sees $2.3B loss as short-term holders sell at record realized losses during capitulation.
data.description: In one of the largest capitulation events for Bitcoin, short-term holders have incurred record realized losses due to the cryptocurrency's sharp decline. This event has seen a significant number of investors selling their holdings at steep losses.

data.title: China Eastern Airlines to offer free in-flight Wi-Fi for Chinese New Year's Eve from 12:00pm on Feb. 16 to 1:00am, giving passengers immersive experience.
data.description: China Eastern Airlines (CEA) has introduced a special in-flight Wi-Fi upgrade for Chinese New Year's Eve, providing passengers with a real-time celebration experience while flying. The offer will be available from 12:00 noon on Feb. 16 (Chinese New Year's Eve) until 1:00 a.m. the next day, Beijing Time. This upgrade will be available on all widebody flights operated by CEA and Shanghai Airlines, offering complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi during this period.

data.title: Israel detains 2 individuals for insider trading on military actions. They used classified info to make bets on Iran ops.
data.description: Israeli officials reported that two individuals, including a military reservist and a civilian, have been detained for reportedly utilizing classified information to make bets pertaining to military attacks on Iran.

data.title: US prosecutors caution about romance scams tied to cryptocurrency, particularly “pig-butchering” schemes, ahead of Valentine’s Day.
data.description: Numerous cases are currently linked to fraudulent "pig-butchering" operations, which involve intricate scams combining emotional manipulation with deceptive cryptocurrency platforms.
